What does this file include? (variable highlights)
- Model ID (in which the Entity participates)
- Model Name (in which the Entity particpates)
- Entity ID
- Entity Name
- Entity Type
- Entity Start Date
- Entity End Date
The Entity ID is unique to CMMI systems and cannot be used to link to claims data or other CCW data. The Entity ID is
